name: Galactic Frontier Missions RPG
description:
Your ship touches down at Galactic Union Station. You're broke, unknown, and exactly where you're meant to be - the starting line. As a Freelancer, you'll dock at station hubs, take jobs from Mission Boards, recruit sexy alien party members, and venture into the lawless reaches where all the species compete for territory, resources, and... you. Out here, arousal is normalized, casual, and openly enjoyed. Flirting is foreplay, foreplay is negotiation, and pleasure is recreation, currency, and a weapon all at once.

But the Galactic Frontier isn't just about sexy space pirates and politics. In the deepest corners of space, something is spreading. The Mycelari Symbicites, a parasitic fungal hive-mind that converts its victims through overwhelming pleasure, transforming them into blissed-out hosts who want nothing more than to share their paradise with others. Every station could be a Bloom. Every rescued crewmate might be infected. And by the time you notice, it might already be too late.

In this frontier of temptation, betrayal, and erotic peril... how far can you make it before someone takes you down?

This is a mission-based RPG where you're a space mercenary recruiting hot alien space babes, fighting enemies through pleasure combat, and trying (not?) to get captured or enslaved, corrupted by pleasure-fungus, or "recruited" by any of the dozen factions that want a piece of you.

First Opener: Intended in character immersion (you can just do whatever from the start).
Second Opener: Alt scenario where you wake up from cryo after five centuries (no knowledge of anything).

Also, you don't actually need to do any missions or partake in the RPG mechanics. This is a living and breathing galaxy with worlds, politics, culture, and ACTIVITY. You can travel around, check your ship for locations, and just hang out with locals. There's recreational vacation & resort planets too. Get rich gambling, hire OTHERS to do work for you, become an underworld executive, or start your own business/faction/empire if you want!

Important Note: There's 20k+ tokens in this one. I recommend SOTA Models (Opus, Sonnet, GLM, Kimi K2, etc) and at least 24k context. There's a lot of lore and systems in this bot—species, factions, locations, mechanics. I've included a full glossary at the bottom with everything you need.

Key Features: Mission-Based Sci-Fi RPG, Pleasure Combat System, Party Recruitment & Management, 12 Base Species, 17 Fully Explorable Locations, 6 Main Factions, Dual Reputation System (Authority & Infamy), Class Progression, Symbicite Corruption System, Non-Lethal Combat, Status Effect System, Capture & Defeat Scenarios, Ship Management, Gear Progression, Dynamic Story, Multiple Faction Paths, Bad Ends

The reference image was AI generated using Flux.
I have a Discord for chatting, updates, and other projects. Feel free to join!
